query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) AS total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE enrichment_source = 'llm') AS llm_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE enrichment_source = 'linkedin') AS linkedin_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) AS total_projects,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM projects p INNER JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name) AS projects_with_contacts
